All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BackendApplication
 
CommonConstants
 
Employee
Represents an employee in the system.
EmployeeConstants
 
EmployeeRepository
Repository interface for managing Employee entities.
EmployeeRole
Enum representing different employee roles within the organization.
EmployeeService
Service class for managing Dipendente (employee) entities.
Facade
Facade class providing a unified interface to manage Employees, Supervisors, Tasks, and Teams.
Person
Abstract base class representing a person in the system.
Supervisor
Represents a Supervisor, which is a specialized type of Employee capable of supervising other employees and managing teams.
SupervisorConstants
 
SupervisorHierarchyIntegrationTest
 
SupervisorRepository
Repository interface for managing Supervisor entities.
SupervisorService
Service class for managing Supervisor entities.
Task
Task entity class.
TaskConstants
 
TaskIntegrationTest
 
TaskRepository
Repository interface for Task entities.
TaskService
Service class for managing Task entities.
TaskState
The TaskState enum represents the lifecycle stages of a task
Team
Team entity class.
TeamConstants
 
TeamRepository
TeamRepository interface for managing Team entities.
TeamService
Service class for managing Team entities.
